About me

I’m Kevin and I love digital interaction and solving problems.
Since 2021, I’ve been diving deep into web development and everything that goes with it. It’s my passion to craft unique and meaningful web experiences with either raw web technologies or frameworks and CMS.
I graduated in 2025 with a bachelor’s degree in Online Media from HFU.
